methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.skip_reason: insufficient narrow peer set in Defense & Security (found 0 same-stage, 0 adjacent-stage, 0 similar-tier; need ≥3)
methods.rationale: 24 same-sector peers exist in Defense & Security, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.

public.rationale: Public-co frontier-tech comp in Defense & Dual-use
Public-co frontier-tech comp in Defense & Dual-use

data.narrative:
Red 6, a Series B+ defense and security company that has raised $100M+, operates within a fragmented frontier-tech sector where conventional peer-median valuation proves unreliable. The broader Defense & Security universe includes 24 same-sector peers, yet only 2 public comparables (DRSHF, IDEAFORGE.NS) and 8 identifiable private peers exist. Among private peers—Anduril Industries, Saronic, Flock Safety, Shield AI, and Chaos Industries—none occupy Red 6's exact stage and valuation tier simultaneously, yielding insufficient density (fewer than 3 datapoints) for robust peer-median triangulation.

The peer-median method is not applicable here due to the absence of same-stage and adjacent-stage comparables meeting minimum threshold requirements. A forced all-sector median would conflate companies across vastly different risk profiles, capital intensity, and commercialization timelines, introducing material bias. The public comparables (DRSHF, IDEAFORGE.NS) operate at different scales and market contexts, limiting their direct applicability.

Without sufficient peer clustering, valuation must rely on alternative methods not detailed in this dataset—such as discounted cash flow, revenue multiple analysis on disclosed metrics, or series-stage benchmarking by capital efficiency. The identified comp set provides directional context only. Key uncertainties center on Red 6's revenue trajectory, customer concentration, and defensibility relative to well-funded peers like Anduril. Further financial transparency from Red 6 would be required to triangulate a defensible range.
